_comment_dalleParams: DALL-E 3 API parameters for image generation
_comment_coverStyle: hybrid: DALL-E background only, then programmatic frame + title/author. backgroundStyleString = prompt for background art (no text).

coverStyle.backgroundStyleString: Memphis design inspired cyberpunk aesthetic: bold geometric patterns, dark backgrounds with neon purple and violet accents, retro 80s Memphis style with abstract shapes, vibrant pinks and blues contrasted against black, purple outlines. Tech-retro fusion, perfect for a book catalogue. No text or typography.
